response.justification: Candidate is a senior full-stack web/cloud engineer (TypeScript/Node.js/DLang) with no demonstrated experience in embedded firmware, LAN-switch products, Linux kernel modification, or the listed security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal). Critically, the role requires native-level Japanese proficiency, which is not listed (only English, Romanian, German). C programming is limited to a short stint at National Instruments 10+ years ago. The mismatch on hard requirements is decisive.
strengths: 15+ years of professional software development experience, well above the 3+ year minimum
Some prior C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on developer tooling
Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD, CI/CD, testing, and cross-functional collaboration
concerns: No native-level Japanese proficiency — a hard requirement
No embedded firmware, LAN-switch, MACsec, 802.1X, or Linux kernel modification experience
Core skill set is web/cloud (TS/Node/React/MongoDB), not C on UNIX for embedded networking

key_factors.factor: No embedded networking / security firmware background
